title: Cadastral Survey & Registration Projects
outline: Course Aims: To enhance theoretical knowledge from course work with practical skills and understanding of cadastral surveying, land registration and spatial analysis. Course Content: Urban and rural cadastral farm surveys, including design, fieldwork, calc ulations, analysis, and plan DEPARTMENTS IN THE FACULTY AND COURSES OFFERED 84 preparation. This course includes 2 major projects, tutorials and a one-week camp project, which takes place during a vacation, away from the UCT campus.
lecture_times: Thursdays, 6th to 8th period mid-semester vacation, second semester
dp_requirements: Attendance at and completion of all assignments.
